ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author or speaker */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the transcript was created or published */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the transcript was created or published */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the transcript was created or published */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the transcript */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the book or source */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the transcript */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the transcript */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transcript */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the transcript in words or characters */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transcript is publicly accessible */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcript was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transcript was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the author */,
  "deathdate" TEXT /* Death date of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the author */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author is still active or deceased */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotated_transcripts" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., note, comment, highlight) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the annotation is public or private */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotated_transcripts_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotated_transcripts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or affiliation of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the analysis metric (e.g., sentiment, topic modeling) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., sentiment, topic modeling, sentiment analysis) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool or model used for analysis */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)
